scripts.build: npm run build -w @exam-portal/shared && npm run build -w @exam-portal/frontend && npm run build -w @exam-portal/backend
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build -w @exam-portal/shared && npm run build -w @exam-portal/frontend
scripts.build:backend: npm run build -w @exam-portal/shared && npm run build -w @exam-portal/backend
